calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-24-2004 Reset To Aug-24-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-24-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of TWO Minors.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Petitioners: Nan Kock Chew and Yock Hone Chew, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Shih Wei Chew and Shih Hai Chew, and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan, parties and Interpreter were swron and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Carl Shih Wei Chew and Andy Shih Hai Chew.
Decree signed in open court.
